steps.title: Restate the time change
steps.content: The prior sentence says the probe shortened Dimorphos's orbital period by 32 minutes. The next sentence gives the before-and-after times: 11 hours 55 minutes and 11 hours 23 minutes, which restate that same 32-minute shortening.

steps.title: Reject additive or example signals
steps.content: Choice B would add a separate point. Choice C would signal a simultaneous event. Choice D would introduce an example of a broader pattern, but the following numbers restate the specific change already mentioned. The needed transition means in other words. The answer is A.
